description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a rectangular form factor, rounded corners, and a blue exterior case. The front features a large touchscreen display with a black bezel, a circular home button at the bottom, and a front-facing camera at the top. The back is solid blue with a stylized three-cube logo in green, orange, and red, and a single camera lens with flash in the top left corner. The left edge has two circular buttons and a small switch, likely for volume control and mute. The right edge is smooth with no visible buttons or ports. The device appears slim and lightweight, typical of contemporary mobile phones.
description: A slim, blue smartphone with a large touchscreen, a three-cube logo on the back, and a single rear camera. The device features a protective blue case and minimal physical buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchscreen display with app icons, a black bezel, and a circular home button at the bottom.
description_view_1: Right edge view displaying the slim blue profile with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a blue case, a three-cube logo in the center, and a single camera with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Left edge view showing two circular buttons and a small switch, likely for volume and mute functions.
attribute_brand_logo: A three-cube logo in green, orange, and red is centered on the back of the device.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a typical smartphone home screen with app icons, a clock showing 9:41 AM, date, and status bar. Apps include calendar, photos, camera, maps, weather, notes, reminders, clock, stocks, and others.
attribute_camera_placement: A single rear camera lens with flash is located in the top left corner on the back. A small front-facing camera is centered above the screen.
attribute_button_layout: Two circular buttons and a small switch are on the left edge, likely for volume and mute. A circular home button is centered below the screen on the front.
attribute_case_or_cover_design: The device is enclosed in a blue protective case that covers the back and sides, with a smooth matte finish and precise cutouts for the camera and buttons.
